_comment: Send Authorization: Bearer <ZENITH_INGEST_SECRET> (or x-zenith-secret). Do not put secrets in JSON.

seo.metaTitle: Sales Call Analysis | Sales Breakdown Institute
seo.metaDescription: Turn a single recorded call into a structured review: failure moments, corrected moves, and a clear next step—without fluff.

hero.headline: See where your last sales call actually broke
hero.subheadline: A practical read on failure moments, not a generic scorecard—built for reps who want the truth fast.

aeo.answerBlock: Sales call analysis is the process of identifying where persuasion, discovery, or commitment broke down—and naming the corrected move for the next conversation.

faqs.question: What do you review first?
faqs.answer: We start with intent-to-commit signals and where the thread of mutual urgency was lost.

sections.heading: What you get
sections.body: A structured breakdown of failure moments mapped to buyer psychology—not personality judgments.

proof.explanation: Show early warning signs in the second half of the first serious call.

conversion.thankYouMessage: Check your inbox for the checklist and next steps.
